inputs.demand_signal: Validated demand for AI-powered proposal generator. Confidence: 0.87. ICP: B2B service companies (agencies, consultancies, IT services) with 5-50 employees sending 10+ proposals monthly. Signal volume: 156 across 3 platforms. Price sensitivity: $100-300/month range. Build complexity: moderate (leverages existing LLM routing and template engine). Estimated time to MVP: 2 weeks.
